name: Tuna Noodle Casserole
recipeIngredient: 2 cans tuna in water (6 oz each), drained
2 cans cream of mushroom soup (10 oz each), condensed and reduced fat
1 can mixed vegetables, frozen and thawed (10 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, thoroughly mix tuna, soup, milk, parsley, and vegetables.
2. Fold in the cooked noodles.
3. Pour mixture into a greased crock-pot.
4. Top with toasted almonds if desired.
5. Cover; cook on low for 7 to 9 hours or high for 3 to 4 hours.
6. Do not overcook noodles—just until tender.
